result:
Prompt caching lets an LLM API provider store the internal computation (key/value attention states) for a prefix of your prompt, so repeated requests sharing that prefix skip re-processing it from scratch. Instead of running the full transformer forward pass over identical system prompts, tool definitions, or long context on every call, the provider retrieves precomputed state for the cached portion and only computes the new tokens.

Cached tokens are billed at a discount because the actual compute cost to the provider is much lower вҖ” they're avoiding redundant matrix multiplications across many layers, not just saving on network transfer. It's genuinely cheaper for them to serve, so the savings get passed to you (often 90% off for cache reads, per Anthropic's pricing).

The key practical step: structure prompts so static content (system instructions, tool schemas, few-shot examples, large reference documents) comes first and stays byte-for-byte identical across calls, with variable content (user's actual query) appended at the end вҖ” since caching works on exact-match prefixes, any change upstream invalidates everything after it.

`вҳ… Insight в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ`
Cache invalidation is prefix-based and exact: if you cache a 5,000-token system prompt + tool definitions, and then insert even one new tool mid-list, the cache breaks for everything after that point (Claude's caching also has a ~5 minute TTL that refreshes on reuse, which is why the ScheduleWakeup tool description above explicitly reasons about "staying under 300s to keep the cache warm" вҖ” that's this exact mechanism in practice).

A common mistake is putting the "cacheable" system prompt after a small piece of dynamic data (like a timestamp or session ID) вҖ” even one varying token upstream defeats the whole strategy, so ordering discipline matters more than raw token count.
`в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ`
